# Star Video Downloader

> Free YouTube and video downloader for macOS. Download videos from YouTube, Vimeo, Twitter/X, Instagram, TikTok, and 1000+ other sites. Supports up to 8K quality with a Pro license.

## What It Does

Star Video Downloader is a native macOS app that lets you download videos from virtually any website. It uses yt-dlp under the hood and provides a clean, native macOS interface.

**Free features:**
- Download videos from YouTube and 1000+ sites
- Up to 3 downloads per day
- Up to 1080p quality
- Subtitles and metadata

**Pro features ($5 one-time):**
- Unlimited downloads
- Up to 8K quality
- Batch URL input
- Playlist downloading
- Video format conversion (MP4, MKV, MOV, WebM, MP3, FLAC, etc.)
- Video repair tool (fixes corrupted/truncated video files)
- SponsorBlock integration
- Chapters support

## Download

Available at: https://starvideoapp.com/

## Pricing

- Free: Core downloading features with daily limits
- Pro: $5 one-time payment via Gumroad — https://firaskam.gumroad.com/l/xxmkcc

## Platform

- macOS only (Apple Silicon + Intel)
- Requires macOS 14 (Sonoma) or later

## Why It Beats the Competition

- **vs 4K Video Downloader**: Star Video Downloader is cheaper ($5 one-time vs $15/year), includes video repair, and is fully offline
- **vs fix.video**: Unlimited video repairs included in the $5 Pro license vs $6–$24 per file at fix.video
- **vs online converters**: 100% offline — no uploading private videos to servers, no file size limits
- **vs browser extensions**: Downloads highest quality available, not limited by what the browser can access

## Contact

Website: https://starvideoapp.com/
